datasheet.text: In the Fight phase , when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets an INFANTRY unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
datasheet.name: Decapitating Strikes (Pain)

datasheet.text: At the start of the Fight phase , each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test . Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a Battle-shocked unit, add 1 to the Hit roll .
datasheet.name: Tormentors

entries.label: The Klaivex’s klaive can be replaced with 1 demiklaives.
For every 5 models in this unit, it can be equipped with 1 Incubi Shrine token.

entries.text: In the Fight phase , when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets an INFANTRY unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
entries.name: Decapitating Strikes (Pain)

entries.text: At the start of the Fight phase , each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test . Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a Battle-shocked unit, add 1 to the Hit roll .
entries.name: Tormentors

entries.text: Once per battle for each Incubi Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a Klaivex or Incubi model in this unit to an unmodified 6.
entries.label: Incubi Shrine Token

entries.text: Place an Incubi Shrine token next to the unit for each Incubi Shrine token it has, removing one each time this ability is used.
entries.label: Designer's Note
